THE COURT JUDICIALLY NOTICES THE FILING OF 2329-2331-2333 PACIFIC HOA'S COMPLAINT IN CASE 512046, BUT NOT ITS CONTENTS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ALFRED WONG'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE CASES CGC-11-512046 AND CGC-11-517449 IS CONTINUED FROM OCT-04-2012 TO OCT-18-2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES.

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT ALFRED WONG'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE CASES CGC-11-512046 AND CGC-11-517449 IS GRANTED. 2329-2331-2333 PACIFIC HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION V. A & D CONSTRUCTION, INC. (CGC-11-512046) AND BRILL V. WONG (CGC-12-517449) ARE CONSOLIDATED FOR ALL PURPOSES. CGC-11-512046 IS DESIGNATED THE LEAD CASE AND ALL FUTURE FILINGS MUST BE IN THAT CASE ONLY. THE TWO ACTIONS INVOLVE COMMON QUESTIONS OF LAW AND FACT. CONSOLIDATION WILL PROMOTE JUDICIAL ECONOMY AND NOT ADVERSELY AFFECT THE RIGHTS OF ANY PARTY. 2329-2331-2333 PACIFIC HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION'S CURRENT PRO PER STATUS DOES NOT WARRANT DENIAL OF THE MOTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2012 Off Calendar

MOTION To Consolidate Cases Cgc-11-512046 And Cgc-11-517449; Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Oct-18-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: BRIAN SORIANO, ESQ., LAW OFFICES OF BRIAN SORIANO, 415.615.0881, FOR PLAINTIFF JON BRILL (CASE 517449).
MILOSLAV KHADILKAR, ESQ., VAN DE POEL, LEVY & ALLEN, 925.934.6102 X259, FOR DEFENDANT A&D CONSTRUCTION INC. (CASE 512046).
ANDREA MURPHY, ESQ., PHILLIPS SPALLAS & ANGSTADT, 415.278.9400, FOR DEFENDANT ALFRED WONG.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT ALFRED WONG'S MOTION To Consolidate Cases CGC-11-512046 And CGC-11-517449 is granted. 2329-2331-2333 Pacific Homeowners Association v. A & D Construction, Inc. (CGC-11-512046) and Brill v. Wong (CGC-12-517449) are consolidated for all purposes. CGC-11-512046 is designated the lead case and all future filings must be in that case only. The two actions involve common questions of law and fact. Consolidation will promote judicial economy and not adversely affect the rights of any party. 2329-2331-2333 Pacific Homeowners Association's current pro per status does not warrant denial of the motion. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-18-2012 Overruled
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: BRIAN SORIANO, ESQ., LAW OFFICES OF BRIAN SORIANO, 415.615.0881, FOR PLAINTIFF JON BRILL (CASE 517449).
MILOSLAV KHADILKAR, ESQ., VAN DE POEL, LEVY & ALLEN, 925.934.6102 X259, FOR DEFENDANT A&D CONSTRUCTION INC. (CASE 512046).
ANDREA MURPHY, ESQ., PHILLIPS SPALLAS & ANGSTADT, 415.278.9400, FOR DEFENDANT ALFRED WONG.

RULING: NO ARGUMENT. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ALFRED WONG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled. Neither lack of standing nor any misjoinder appears on the face of the Complaint or by judicially noticeable facts. The court judicially notices the filing of 2329-2331-2333 Pacific HOA's Complaint in case 512046, but not its contents. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-04-2012 Continued To Oct-18-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANT ALFRED WONG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS continued to October 18, 2012 per the agreement of the parties. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 =(302/HEK)
